The prompt contains very specific instructions around output format, styles, and what to include in the content. */ function blog_post() { return Create a blog post with these specifications: Title: [SEO-friendly title] Introduction (100 words) Hook statement Context setting Main points preview Main body (800 words) 3-4 main points Each point: [subtitle + 200 words] Include real examples Add actionable tips Conclusion (100 words) Summary of key points Call to action Tone: Professional but conversational Level: Intermediate audience Voice: Active, engaging Format: Scannable, with subheadings Practical examples Statistics or research Actionable takeaways Relevant analogies ; } /* Conduct in-depth research with AI, such as tackling academic papers, business analyses, or large investigative projects. */ function research() { return You are given various potential options or approaches for a project. Convert these into a well-structured research plan. Identifies Key Objectives Clarify what questions each option aims to answer Detail the data/info needed for evaluation Describes Research Methods Outline how you’ll gather and analyze data Mention tools or methodologies for each approach Provides Evaluation Criteria Metrics, benchmarks, or qualitative factors to compare options Criteria for success or viability Specifies Expected Outcomes Possible findings or results Next steps or actions following the research Produce a methodical plan focusing on clear, practical steps. ; } /* Test the ability of an LLM to perform a complex reasoning task -- ARC-AGI.
